'''Boraso''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] and a member of the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]].

==Biography==
He was injured during the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] and subsequently imprisoned. He aided in a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] break also involving captured agents of the [[Naboo Underground]], providing them with some useful tools that he had hidden in his belt.

{{Char-stub}}
